title: Greek Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy Mediterranean salad featuring tomatoes, cucumbers, Kalamata olives, and feta cheese.
steps: Combine tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and olives in a shallow bowl.
Drizzle generously with extra virgin olive oil.
Sprinkle dried oregano and a pinch of salt over the vegetables.
Place the block of feta cheese right on top of the salad.
Serve immediately as a fresh appetizer or side dish.

cookingTips: For the best Greek Salad, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Greek Salad ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
